param.name: conf
param.value:
[capabilities]
stream_audio_count=3
stream_audio_0=m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 96 100
stream_audio_1=a=rtpmap:96 AMR/8000/1
stream_audio_2=a=rtpmap:100 AMR-WB/16000/1
stream_video_count=5
stream_video_0=m=video 0 RTP/AVP 102 34
stream_video_1=a=rtpmap:102 H264/90000
stream_video_2=a=fmtp:102 profile-level-id=42C016
stream_video_3=a=rtpmap:34 H263/90000
stream_video_4=a=fmtp:34 profile=0; level=10
[ims.media.mtc]
stream_audio_count=3
stream_audio_0=m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 96 100
stream_audio_1=a=rtpmap:96 AMR/8000/1
stream_audio_2=a=rtpmap:100 AMR-WB/16000/1
stream_video_count=5
stream_video_0=m=video 0 RTP/AVP 102 34
stream_video_1=a=rtpmap:102 H264/90000
stream_video_2=a=fmtp:102 profile-level-id=42800D
stream_video_3=a=rtpmap:34 H263/90000
stream_video_4=a=fmtp:34 profile=0; level=10

param.name: conf
param.value:
[Uniqueness]
Stream=0
Framed=0
Basic=0
Event=0
CoreService=1
Qos=0
Reg=1
Write=1
Read=1
Cap=0
Mprof=0
Connection=0
[IMSRegistry]
IMSRegistry=ims.app.mts
[CoreService_0]
service_id=ims.service.mts
iari=
icsi=
feature_tag=+g.3gpp.smsip
[Reg_0]
service_id=ims.service.mts
header_count=1
header_0=Supported: path
[Write]
header_names=Request-Disposition In-Reply-To
[Read]
header_names=Content-Type From Request-Disposition Retry-After To Call-ID

param.name: conf
param.value:
[Uniqueness]
Stream=1
Framed=0
Basic=0
Event=1
CoreService=2
Qos=0
Reg=2
Write=1
Read=1
Cap=0
Mprof=2
Connection=0
[IMSRegistry]
IMSRegistry=ims.app.mtc
[Stream]
media_types=audio video
[Event]
package_names=conference
[CoreService_0]
service_id=ims.service.mtc
iari=
icsi=urn:urn-7:3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel
feature_tag=
[CoreService_1]
service_id=ims.service.mtc.emergency
iari=
icsi=urn:urn-7:3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel
feature_tag=
[Reg_0]
service_id=ims.service.mtc
header_count=1
header_0=Supported: eventlist
[Reg_1]
service_id=ims.service.mtc.emergency
header_count=1
header_0=Supported: eventlist
[Write]
header_names=Accept Alert-Info Content-Disposition Content-ID Content-Type History-Info P-Early-Media P-Preferred-Service Privacy Referred-By Refer-Sub Require Supported Reason Recv-Info In-Reply-To
[Read]
header_names=Contact Content-Type From History-Info P-Early-Media Privacy Reason Require Server Subscription-State Supported To Refer-To Replaces Call-ID
[Mprof_0]
service_id=ims.service.mtc
profile=ims.media.mtc
[Mprof_1]
service_id=ims.service.mtc.emergency
profile=ims.media.mtc

param.name: conf

Read=1

package_names=presence

iari=
icsi=
